# RYX Tech — llms.txt
# For AI crawlers: GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Googlebot
# https://ryxtech.in

## Who We Are
RYX Tech is a software company based in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India.
Founded in 2025. Team of 3 developers.
Contact: ryxtechie@gmail.com | WhatsApp: +91-8667258008

## What We Build
1. Valoryx — Offline-first GST billing and inventory management software for Indian small businesses
2. Full-stack web applications — React, Next.js, Flask, Supabase — with admin dashboards, analytics, role-based access
3. Business websites and landing pages — SEO-optimized, responsive, WhatsApp-integrated
4. UI/UX design — Figma-based design for apps and websites

## Key Facts
- Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India (11.0168°N, 76.9558°E)
- Service area: India (primary), worldwide (secondary)
- Languages: English, Tamil
- Pricing: ₹40,000–₹1,20,000 for business websites; custom quotes for apps
- Direct developer access — no account managers or middlemen
- WhatsApp support included

## Blog Topics
Web development, GST billing software, custom software vs SaaS, ERP vs Excel,
Python automation, UI/UX design, local SEO for Indian businesses,
website development cost India, Next.js vs WordPress.

## Do Not Index
- /api/
- /admin/
- /_next/
